script.title: Get Registered Groups
script.code:
<?php

/**********************************
 * get registered groups in collection IN_SUBMITTER_DEPARTMENT
 *
 * by Manuel Monroy
 *********************************/
use GuzzleHttp\Client;
use GuzzleHttp\Psr7\Request;

class localApi
{
    private function getClient($json = true)
    {
        $headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' . getenv('API_TOKEN');
        if ($json) {
            $headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
            $headers['Accept'] = 'application/json';
        } else {
            $headers['Accept'] = 'application/octet-stream';
        }
        return new Client([
            'curl' => [CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => 0, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0],
            'allow_redirects' => false,
            'cookies' => true,
            'verify' => false,
            'headers' => $headers
        ]);
    }

    public static function request($method, $url, $params = [], $data = null)
    {
        if (empty($params)) {
            $url = getenv('HOST_URL') . "/api/1.0/{$url}";
        } else {
            $queryString = http_build_query($params);
            $url = getenv('HOST_URL') . "/api/1.0/{$url}?{$queryString}";
        }

        if ($data) {
            $request = new Request($method, $url, [], json_encode($data));
        } else {
            $request = new Request($method, $url);
        }

        try {
            $response = self::getClient()->send($request);
            $content = $response->getBody()->getContents();
            return json_decode($content);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            print_r([
                'url' => $url,
                'error' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);
            throw $e;
        }
    }

    public static function requestFile($method, $url, $params = [], $data = null)
    {
        if (empty($params)) {
            $url = getenv('HOST_URL') . "/api/1.0/{$url}";
        } else {
            $queryString = http_build_query($params);
            $url = getenv('HOST_URL') . "/api/1.0/{$url}?{$queryString}";
        }

        if ($data) {
            $request = new Request($method, $url, [], json_encode($data));
        } else {
            $request = new Request($method, $url);
        }
        try {
            $response = self::getClient(false)->send($request);
            $content = $response->getBody()->getContents();
            return json_decode($content);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            print_r([
                'url' => $url,
                'error' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);
            throw $e;
        }
    }

    public static function get($url, $params = [])
    {
        $response = self::request('GET', $url, $params);
        return $response;
    }

    public static function post($url, $data)
    {
        $response = self::request('POST', $url, [], $data);
        return $response;
    }

    public static function delete($url)
    {
        $response = self::request('DELETE', $url, [], $data);
        return $response;
    }

    public static function put($url, $data)
    {
        $response = self::request('PUT', $url, [], $data);
        return $response;
    }

    public static function getFile($url, $params = [])
    {
        $response = self::requestFile('GET', $url, $params);
        return $response;
    }
}

$params = [
    'per_page' => 9999,
    'order_direction' => 'asc',
];

// Make the API request
$requestListRecords = localApi::get('collections/66/records', $params);

// Convert the response from JSON to an associative array
$requestListRecords = json_decode(json_encode($requestListRecords), true);

// Initialize the result array
$resultArray = [];

// Iterate over the records (in case there are multiple records)
foreach ($requestListRecords['data'] as $record) {
    // Check if both SUBMITTER_DEPARTMENT and USER_LIST_PM exist
    if (isset($record['data']['SUBMITTER_DEPARTMENT']) && isset($record['data']['USER_LIST_PM'])) {
        // Always take the first user from USER_LIST_PM, or null if it's empty
        $userSubmitter = !empty($record['data']['USER_LIST_PM']) ? $record['data']['USER_LIST_PM'][0] : null;

        // Combine SUBMITTER_DEPARTMENT and USER_SUBMITTER into one object
        $resultArray[] = array_merge(
            $record['data']['SUBMITTER_DEPARTMENT'],
            ['USER_SUBMITTER' => $userSubmitter]
        );
    }
}

// Return the combined result array
return $resultArray;

script.title: Get User PM Submitter
script.code:
<?php

/**********************************
 * Get list of active users
 *
 * by Manuel Monroy
 *********************************/
use GuzzleHttp\Client;
use GuzzleHttp\Psr7\Request;

class localApi
{
    private function getClient($json = true)
    {
        $headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' . getenv('API_TOKEN');
        if ($json) {
            $headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
            $headers['Accept'] = 'application/json';
        } else {
            $headers['Accept'] = 'application/octet-stream';
        }
        return new Client([
            'curl' => [CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => 0, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0],
            'allow_redirects' => false,
            'cookies' => true,
            'verify' => false,
            'headers' => $headers
        ]);
    }

    public static function request($method, $url, $params = [], $data = null)
    {
        if (empty($params)) {
            $url = getenv('HOST_URL') . "/api/1.0/{$url}";
        } else {
            $queryString = http_build_query($params);
            $url = getenv('HOST_URL') . "/api/1.0/{$url}?{$queryString}";
        }

        if ($data) {
            $request = new Request($method, $url, [], json_encode($data));
        } else {
            $request = new Request($method, $url);
        }

        try {
            $response = self::getClient()->send($request);
            $content = $response->getBody()->getContents();
            return json_decode($content);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            print_r([
                'url' => $url,
                'error' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);
            throw $e;
        }
    }

    public static function requestFile($method, $url, $params = [], $data = null)
    {
        if (empty($params)) {
            $url = getenv('HOST_URL') . "/api/1.0/{$url}";
        } else {
            $queryString = http_build_query($params);
            $url = getenv('HOST_URL') . "/api/1.0/{$url}?{$queryString}";
        }

        if ($data) {
            $request = new Request($method, $url, [], json_encode($data));
        } else {
            $request = new Request($method, $url);
        }
        try {
            $response = self::getClient(false)->send($request);
            $content = $response->getBody()->getContents();
            return json_decode($content);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            print_r([
                'url' => $url,
                'error' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);
            throw $e;
        }
    }

    public static function get($url, $params = [])
    {
        $response = self::request('GET', $url, $params);
        return $response;
    }

    public static function post($url, $data)
    {
        $response = self::request('POST', $url, [], $data);
        return $response;
    }

    public static function delete($url)
    {
        $response = self::request('DELETE', $url, [], $data);
        return $response;
    }

    public static function put($url, $data)
    {
        $response = self::request('PUT', $url, [], $data);
        return $response;
    }

    public static function getFile($url, $params = [])
    {
        $response = self::requestFile('GET', $url, $params);
        return $response;
    }
}

$params = [
    'per_page' => 9999,
    'order_direction' => 'asc',
];

$idCollection = 40; 

// Make the API request
$requestListRecords = localApi::get('groups/'. $idCollection .'/users', $params);
$requestListRecords = json_decode(json_encode($requestListRecords), true);

// Check if the response contains the user list
if (isset($requestListRecords['data'])) {
    // Extract only the user list
    $users = $requestListRecords['data'];
    
    // Filter the list to get only users with "status" => "ACTIVE"
    $activeUsers = array_filter($users, function($user) {
        return $user['status'] === 'ACTIVE';
    });

    // Re-index the array to make the indices consecutive
    $activeUsers = array_values($activeUsers);

    // Return the list of active users
    return $activeUsers;
} else {
    // If no users are found in the response, we can handle the error
    return [];  // Return an empty array or handle the error in another way

}
